definition_en: to hand a task to another agent instead of doing it yourself
example_en: The coordinator delegates the task to a sub-agent with proxy capabilities.

definition_en: the specific abilities or functions an agent or tool has
example_en: Route the task to a sub-agent with the right capabilities, such as web search.

definition_en: happening too early, before the right time
example_en: Giving the drawing agent the simulation tool caused premature tool execution before the drawing was finished.

definition_en: to check that something is true or correct
example_en: Use an independent reviewer agent to verify the assignments, not the agent that made them.

definition_en: the quality of being logically correct or well founded
example_en: The critique block was added to check the validity of the task assignments.

definition_en: when too much information weakens the model's focus on what matters
example_en: Reading hundreds of files at once causes attention dilution and lowers accuracy.

definition_en: the tendency to defend your own previous decision instead of finding its errors
example_en: In the same session the model shows self-justification and cannot spot its own mistakes.

definition_en: the tendency to favor information that supports your existing conclusion
example_en: Generating and critiquing in one context invites confirmation bias.

definition_en: a proxy server that routes requests through a home internet connection to look like a normal user
example_en: Delegate the scraping to a sub-agent with residential proxy capabilities to avoid IP blocks.

definition_en: following the required rules or standards
example_en: The agent flags products that are not compliant with the safety standards.

definition_en: to take in a whole set of data at once
example_en: Publish the catalog as an MCP resource so the agent can ingest the entire dataset.

definition_en: a software layer between the app and a tool, used here to filter data before it reaches the model
example_en: Filter the payload in middleware so the model receives only the needed fields.
